---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Private PageIndex RAG
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I can't..."

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Provide context on how this improves the hierarchical document traversal or spatial graph UI.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Privacy & Local-First Boundaries Check
*   [ ] Does this proposed feature respect the local privacy guarantee (no data leaves the machine)?
*   [ ] Does it avoid introducing external web APIs or hosted cloud models?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, drawings, or mockups about the feature request here.
